source: Aggregated from public deal sites (Doctor of Credit, AwardWallet, Thrifty Traveler, Upgraded Points)

offers.description: Earn a $10 statement credit after spending a minimum of $30 in qualifying purchases online at gopuff.com. Can be used up to 3 times for a total of $30 in credits.
offers.terms: Online at gopuff.com only. Limit 3 statement credits per card member. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $50 back in statement credits after making one or more qualifying purchases totaling a minimum of $99 for CLEAR Concierge services. Must have an existing CLEAR+ membership.
offers.terms: Online only at clearme.com/clear-concierge. Must have existing CLEAR+ Membership. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5,000 bonus Membership Rewards points when you spend $250 or more with Airbnb. Add offer to your card and complete a qualifying purchase by the expiry date.
offers.terms: Enrollment required. One-time offer. Points post within 90 days.

offers.description: Earn 20% back as a one-time statement credit on a single car rental booked directly with Turo online or through the Turo mobile app. Car must be returned and paid for by expiry date.
offers.terms: One-time offer. Reservations booked at turo.com or Turo app. Car must be returned and paid for by 3/31/2026.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $50 statement credit after spending a minimum of $200 in one or more purchases in-store at Revo or online at revo.com.
offers.terms: In-store and online at revo.com. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a $20 statement credit after spending $49.99 or more on a YouTube TV subscription. Can be used up to 3 times for a total of $60 in credits.
offers.terms: Subscription purchase at tv.youtube.com only. Limit 3 credits. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get $50 back when you spend $250 or more on prepaid lodging bookings at booking.com/amexoffer.
offers.terms: Prepaid lodging bookings only at booking.com/amexoffer. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get $200 statement credit when you spend $750 or more on Holland America cruise reservations.
offers.terms: Cruise reservations and onboard spend only. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5 bonus Membership Rewards points per dollar spent on AmaWaterways cruise reservations and onboard purchases, up to 50,000 bonus points.
offers.terms: Onboard spend and reservations only. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get $100 statement credit when you spend $500 or more on Cruise America RV rentals. Rental must be completed and paid by expiry date.
offers.terms: RV rentals must be completed and paid by 4/6/2026. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $100 back as a statement credit when you spend $500 or more at Lotte Hotel Seattle on room rate and room charges.
offers.terms: Room rate and charges at participating Lotte Hotel Seattle only. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $200 back as a statement credit when you spend $750 or more at Lotte New York Palace on room rate and room charges.
offers.terms: Room rate and room charges only. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $500 back as a statement credit when you spend $2,000 or more on Micato Safaris reservations.
offers.terms: Safari reservations only. Excludes third-party bookings. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $150 back as a statement credit when you spend $750 or more on room rate and room charges at participating AKA properties in the U.S.
offers.terms: Room rate and room charges at participating U.S. AKA properties only. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get $250 back when you spend $1,250 or more with Aer Lingus on flights originating in the U.S. Represents a 20% return on qualifying spend.
offers.terms: Flights from the U.S. only. Book via Aer Lingus website or app. Targeted offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get $250 statement credit when you spend $2,000 or more on Virgin Atlantic flight purchases.
offers.terms: Flight purchases only. Targeted offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Spend $60 or more at Walmart.com and earn $20 back as a statement credit. Can be used up to 2 times for a total of $40 back.
offers.terms: Walmart.com and mobile app only. In-store purchases excluded. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5% back as a statement credit on purchases at Firehouse Subs.
offers.terms: In-store and online purchases. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5% back as a statement credit on purchases at Jack in the Box.
offers.terms: In-store and online purchases. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5% back as a statement credit on purchases at Sonic Drive-In.
offers.terms: In-store and drive-in purchases. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% back as a statement credit on prepaid hotel bookings through Expedia, up to $120 back.
offers.terms: Prepaid hotels using the prepaid option at checkout only at expedia.com/amex. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Business Platinum cardholders can earn up to $1,150 in yearly Dell Technologies credits, including up to $150 in statement credits for Dell purchases plus an additional $1,000 after spending $5,000/year.
offers.terms: Business Platinum Card only. Dell.com purchases. Annual benefit resets each calendar year.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $50 statement credit when you spend $250 or more at Alamo Rent-A-Car in-person at U.S. locations or online at alamo.com.
offers.terms: In-person at Alamo Rent-A-Car US locations or online at alamo.com. One-time credit. Targeted offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get $50 back when you spend $65 or more on AT&T wireless service. Some users report it also works for AT&T internet services.
offers.terms: AT&T wireless purchases. Enrollment required. Targeted offer.

offers.description: Earn a $15 statement credit on Visible wireless purchases of $15 or more.
offers.terms: Online purchases at visible.com. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a $15 statement credit on Total Wireless purchases of $15 or more.
offers.terms: Online purchases. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a $25 statement credit when you spend $45 or more on Tracfone wireless service.
offers.terms: Online purchases. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $20 statement credit when you spend $45 or more at straighttalk.com.
offers.terms: Online at straighttalk.com only. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $50 back as a statement credit when you spend $250 or more at Airbnb. Book directly at airbnb.com or via the Airbnb app. Some cardholders may see a $30 back variant instead.
offers.terms: Online at airbnb.com or Airbnb app only. One-time offer. Gift cards excluded. Enrollment required.
